title: Minimal Status Effect Timer
body:
<center>

  A mod that shows your Status Effect Remaining Time in a minimal fashion.

  Inspired by: [Status Effect Bars](https://modrinth.com/mod/status-effect-bars). \
  ![Status Effect Bar Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/oJod2tJI/images/326dd85bb09ccb1a35a9d5515ccfdd5d3fa4f735.gif)
  
</center>
